svg.title: Matter lifecycle workflow — Lozano Legal Advisors PLLC
svg.desc: Swim lane diagram showing how a tax controversy matter flows through four stages (intake, onboard, active, closure) across three actors (client, firm tools, external systems).
svg.text: From inquiry through closure across firm systems
After closure: file retention 5+ years per TDRPC 1.15 · stored in SharePoint and Clio
Inside compliance perimeter throughout · all transitions logged · audit trail in Clio + M365
